name: ticket_number_present
expression: ticket_number IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(ticket_number)) > 0
description: ticket_number is required for Field Ticket extraction.

name: service_date_present
expression: service_date IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(service_date)) > 0
description: service_date is required for Field Ticket extraction.

name: operator_name_present
expression: operator_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(operator_name)) > 0
description: operator_name is required for Field Ticket extraction.

name: service_company_name_present
expression: service_company_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(service_company_name)) > 0
description: service_company_name is required for Field Ticket extraction.

name: job_type_present
expression: job_type IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(job_type)) > 0
description: job_type is required for Field Ticket extraction.

name: total_amount_present
expression: total_amount IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(total_amount)) > 0
description: total_amount is required for Field Ticket extraction.

name: subtotal_amount_non_negative
description: subtotal_amount should be non-negative when present.

name: tax_amount_non_negative
description: tax_amount should be non-negative when present.

name: total_amount_non_negative
description: total_amount should be non-negative when present.
